title: Remote assistance video reconnect fix
description:
Black admin video was caused by WebRTC signal POSTs timing out (502): every ICE candidate triggered a Postgres insert plus an expensive buffer trim query, flooding the server. Trims removed; ICE posts throttled; signal poll uses in-flight guard and multi-batch drain.

Who is affected: remote help screen share on pipeshare.live.
changeLog: Remove per-insert signal/input buffer trim that caused 502 timeouts.
Throttle ICE candidate signal posts (batched, chained).
Signal poll in-flight guard; drain up to 6 batches per tick.
Fix screen-ready handling when signals arrive via poll not SSE.
